name: token-usage-dashboard
description: Local dashboard + Windows corner widget for multi-harness token usage (Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Claude, OpenRouter, Kimi, Z.AI, Grok).

scripts.test: node --import tsx --test tests/usage.test.ts tests/providers.test.ts tests/e2e-smoke.test.ts tests/server-launch.test.cjs tests/start-widget.test.cjs tests/format-reset.test.cjs tests/widget-compact.test.cjs tests/login-launch.test.ts
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm test && node scripts/e2e-evidence.mjs
